name: Nico
styleLock: Nico must appear in every panel: large slightly pinkish-red round nose, half-sleepy eyelids, messy short dark hair with distinctive spikes, wearing an open green casual collared jacket, white t-shirt with a centered black lightning bolt graphic on the chest, beige/tan pants, bright yellow sneakers with white soles, oversized wristwatch on left wrist. Art style: minimalist ligne claire European comic style, clean uniform thin black ink outlines, flat colors overlaid with visible vintage comic halftone dot shading texture. Global constraints: pure white background only, isolated character, no scenery, no background elements, props minimal, absolutely no text anywhere, no speech bubbles, no captions, no signs, no numbers, no sound effects, blank screens.
